lang.switch.label: فارسی
home.title: Waldi
home.empty.following.heading: Your Waldi home is waiting on some follows
home.empty.following.body: Once you follow a writer, their new posts will show up here.
landing.hero.heading: A quiet place to write, and to be read.
landing.hero.sub: Every post is read by strangers. Every reader gets one surprise a day.
landing.hero.invite: Writing is by invitation for now.
landing.letter.heading: The internet forgot how to read.
landing.letter.p1: Waldi is a blogging platform built on two simple ideas: people should write without dealing with algorithms, so every post is shown to at least a hundred readers — no need to have any followers or write in any predefined structure.
landing.letter.p2: The second idea is that we should find posts by chance, not through algorithms that decide what to show us. So every reader gets one stranger's post every morning, without needing to follow them. We call this serendipity.
landing.letter.p3: Waldi is your home for writing and reading — without any noise, likes, or pressure to get fake dopamine.
landing.finish.sub: Made for people who miss blogs.
post.owner.delete_confirm: Delete this post? It will be removed from your blog and its address will stop working. Letters it received will remain.
post.subscribe.heading: New writing, every morning, and a letter from a stranger.
post.subscribe.body: That's it. No newsletter, no ads. Leave anytime, one click.
post.subscribe.sent: Done. Watch your inbox tomorrow morning.
letter.body.help: Only the writer will read this.
letter.login_prompt: Log in to write a letter.
letter.gate.hint: Read a few more posts to unlock letters.
letter.sent: Sent. Letters travel quietly — you'll hear back if they write.
profile.subhead: This writer's public posts are published on this subdomain.
profile.heading: %s
profile.title: %s's blog
profile.empty.heading: Welcome to Waldi
profile.empty.body: Once a post is published, it will show up here, quiet and readable.
blog.settings.title: Blog settings
blog.settings.heading: Your public blog
blog.settings.lead: How your blog appears to readers.
blog.settings.display_name.help: At the top of your blog and on follow buttons.
blog.settings.author_name.help: In the quiet line at the bottom of your blog.
blog.settings.bio.help: A short line under your blog name.
blog.settings.lang.help: Labels on your blog and the default for new posts.
blog.settings.error.form: The form could not be read.
blog.settings.error.display_name: The blog name is too long.
blog.settings.error.author_name: The author name is too long.
blog.settings.error.save: Could not save your blog settings.
blog.settings.domain.heading: Custom domain
blog.settings.domain.lead: Use a domain you own instead of your Waldi subdomain.
blog.settings.domain.label: Domain
blog.settings.domain.help: Register a domain with a provider first, then enter it here and add the DNS records Waldi shows. A subdomain like blog.example.com is usually easiest.
blog.settings.domain.verify.intro: Add these DNS records at your provider, then verify.
blog.settings.domain.instructions.txt: Add a TXT record for %s with value %s.
blog.settings.domain.instructions.cname: Add a CNAME record from %s to %s.
blog.settings.domain.instructions.apex: Using a root domain (no subdomain)? Most providers won't let a root domain hold a CNAME. Instead, add an A/AAAA record pointing your root domain at the same address(es) the CNAME target above resolves to — or use your provider's ALIAS/ANAME feature if it offers one.
blog.settings.domain.error.required: Enter the domain you want to connect.
blog.settings.domain.error.placeholder: That looks like a placeholder domain. Use one you have registered.
blog.settings.domain.error.reserved: That domain can't be used as a custom domain.
blog.settings.domain.error.taken: That domain is already connected to another account.
blog.settings.domain.error.pending: The TXT record wasn't found yet. DNS changes can take a few minutes to propagate — try again shortly.
blog.settings.domain.error.cname_pending: The CNAME record doesn't point to the Waldi routing hostname yet. DNS changes can take a few minutes — try again shortly.
blog.settings.domain.notice.set: Domain saved. Add the TXT and CNAME records below, then verify.
blog.settings.pages.heading: Pages
blog.settings.pages.lead: Fixed rooms in your blog — alongside your posts, above the feed.
blog.settings.pages.hint: Up to %d pages. Pages don't appear in the feed or the daily stranger.
blog.settings.pages.error.title: Give the page a title.
blog.settings.pages.error.slug: Enter an address for this page.
blog.settings.pages.error.slug_taken: That address is already in use.
blog.settings.account.heading: Account
blog.settings.account.ui_lang.help: Language for buttons and menus — not your writing.
blog.settings.account.export.body: — everything, in one file. Your writing is yours; take it with you whenever you'd like.
blog.settings.password.error.length: The new password must be at least 8 characters.
blog.settings.delete.body: Deletes your account, your blog, and every post permanently. If you want to keep your words, download the export first.
blog.settings.delete.confirm: Delete your account and all of its posts? This cannot be undone.
you.post.date_note: Only the displayed date changes; feed placement and readers who already saw it aren't affected.
you.post.date_error: That date couldn't be used — check the format (YYYY/MM/DD) and that it isn't in the future.
letter.view.heading: A letter about "%s"
letter.page.title: Letter from %s

auth.login.heading: Welcome back.
auth.field.blog_name.help: Shown at the top of your blog. You can change this later.
auth.field.blog_description.help: A short line about your blog. Optional — you can change this later.
auth.field.email.help: Only for signing in and your morning digest.
auth.field.email.forgot.help: We'll send a reset link if this email is registered.
auth.error.username: Subdomain must be 3-32 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens.
auth.error.blog_name: Blog name must be 80 characters or fewer.
auth.error.blog_description: Blog description must be 500 characters or fewer.
auth.error.password_len: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.error.invite_invalid: This invitation link is invalid or has already been used.
auth.error.duplicate: That username or email is already registered.
auth.forgot.title: Forgot password — Waldi
auth.forgot.heading: Forgot your password?
auth.forgot.sent: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way.
auth.reset.title: New password — Waldi
auth.reset.heading: Choose a new password.
auth.error.reset_invalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.verify.title: Confirm your email
auth.verify.heading: Confirm your email
auth.verify.body: We sent a quiet note to your inbox. Open the link inside to start writing.
auth.verify.done: Your email is confirmed. You can start.
auth.verify.resent: Another verification email is on its way.
auth.verify.wait: Please wait a couple of minutes before requesting another email.
unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe
unsubscribe.heading: Unsubscribe from digest emails
unsubscribe.confirm: You'll stop receiving Waldi's daily activity digest. You can turn it back on later from your settings.
unsubscribe.invalid: This unsubscribe link is invalid or has expired.
resume.title: Resume digests
resume.heading: Digest emails resumed
resume.done: You're back on the list — Waldi's digests will keep coming.
resume.invalid: This link is invalid or has expired.

write.invite.title: Writing here is invited — Waldi
write.invite.heading: Writing here is by invitation for now.
write.invite.sub: Founding writers are shaping how this place works — quietly, one at a time.
write.invite.code.heading: Have an invitation?
write.invite.code.label: Invitation code
write.invite.error.code_invalid: This invitation code is invalid or has already been used.
write.invite.request.heading: Want to write here?
write.invite.request.sub: Tell us where you write and what you'd write about. We read every one and get back to you.
write.invite.request.link.label: Where you write
write.invite.request.link.placeholder: A blog, a channel, or a single piece
write.invite.request.link.hint: Anywhere — old work is fine too.
write.invite.request.note.label: A line about your writing
write.invite.request.hint: You'll hear from a person, not a system.
write.invite.request.sent: Sent. You'll hear from us soon.
write.invite.error.note_required: Tell us a bit about your writing.

editor.embed.invalid: That URL isn't a supported embed

error.render: Something went wrong rendering this page
error.home: Something went wrong showing the home page
error.post: Something went wrong showing this post
error.profile: Something went wrong showing this blog
error.not_found.title: 404 — Waldi
error.not_found.heading: There's no page here.
error.not_found.body: Maybe the address changed, maybe the writer took it down, maybe a letter went missing somewhere along the way. Either way, this is the quietest page on waldi — nothing to read, nothing to finish.
error.not_found.write_link: write the page that should have been here
error.gone.heading: This post is gone.
error.gone.body: The writer took this one down. Its address won't work again, but the letters it received are still with them.
seo.landing.title: Waldi — a quiet place to write, and to be read
seo.landing.description: A quiet place to write and be read. Every post reaches strangers; every reader gets one surprise a day.
digest.subject: Your Waldi daily digest
import_blogir.title: Import from blog.ir
import_blogir.heading: Import from blog.ir
import_blogir.lead: Upload your blog.ir posts archive export (an XML file) to bring your posts over. Every post is imported as published, using its original blog.ir dates.
import_blogir.error.file_missing: Please choose your blog.ir export file.
import_blogir.error.file_too_large: That file is too large or could not be read.
import_blogir.error.parse: That doesn't look like a blog.ir export file.
import_blogir.result.heading: Import finished
